name: Milestone Fork & Merge
description: Fork a milestone into a worktree, run full lifecycle, then merge back

fork.description: Create worktree for milestone with all phases

lifecycle_in_worktree.description: Run sequential lifecycle for all phases in worktree (analyze, plan, execute, verify, transition per phase)

merge_decision.description: Check if all milestone phases are completed

merge.description: Merge milestone worktree back into main

done.summary: Milestone {milestone_num} forked, developed, and merged successfully
